title: melicope pteleifolia
intro: Melicope pteleifolia, also known as the yellow Haw, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Hawaii and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Melicope pteleifolia include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it a potential treatment for various conditions, including infections and pain management. Melicope pteleifolia is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being used in traditional medicine practices in its native regions.
